betterquesting:10.desc:8:
All astral fluid veins have a minimum of 50000000mb fluid in them. The list of possible veins is below.

        charcoal byproducts
        natural gas
        sulfuric gas
        sulfuric naphtha 
        sulfuric light fuel
        sulfuric heavy fuel
        steamcracked naphtha 
        steamcracked gas 
        cracked light fuel 
        cracked heavy fuel 
        hydrocracked naphtha 
        hydrocracked gas
        hydrocracked light fuel 
        hydrocracked heavy fuel
